channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two Parents Charged Following Death of Three-Month-Old Baby in North London
item.description: Two parents in North London have been formally charged with the murder of their three-month-old son. Dounia Chetaouat, aged 32, and Abdelkader Essid, aged 44, allegedly caused or allowed serious harm ...

item.title: Police launch investigation into multiple cases of online racist abuse targeting Premier League and Scottish Premiership players
item.description: UK police have launched an investigation following a series of online racist abuse incidents targeting professional footballers over a single weekend. The UK Football Policing Unit (UKFPU) confirmed i...

item.title: U.S. Nuclear Expansion Faces Potential Uranium Enrichment Supply Shortage Before New Facilities Come Online
item.description: The United States is pursuing an ambitious goal to quadruple its nuclear power capacity from around 100 gigawatts to 400 gigawatts by 2050, driven by surging electricity demand from AI data centers an...

item.title: UK Government Considers Social Media Restrictions for Young People
item.description: The UK government has launched a consultation to explore the idea of restricting children's access to social media platforms like TikTok, Snapchat, and Instagram. The consultation follows growing conc...

item.title: Government outlines major reforms to SEND support and introduces Individual Support Plans
item.description: The UK government has announced significant reforms to the support system for children with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) in English schools. Education Secretary Bridget Phillipson...

item.title: Vicky Pattison reassures fans after evacuation in Dubai amidst missile and drone attacks
item.description: Vicky Pattison and Luisa Zissman have both shared updates on social media, assuring their followers that they feel safe despite the escalating violence in Dubai. The two celebrities, who were in the c...

item.title: RFK Jr.'s Protein Claims Contradicted by Grok-Powered Nutrition Website
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has been advocating for more protein in American diets, with recent government dietary guidelines suggesting an increase in protein intake. However, the Grok-powered food website...

item.title: UK Teenager Convicted of Terrorism-Related Offences for Membership in Proscribed Far-Right Group The Base and Related Activities
item.description: A 16-year-old boy from a village in Northumberland, who was 15 at the time of the offences, has been unanimously convicted at Leeds Crown Court of three terrorism charges: possession of terrorist docu...

item.title: OpenAI Expands on Its Deal with the Pentagon and AI Safety Measures
item.description: OpenAI has elaborated on its recent agreement with the U.S. Department of Defense, following a series of events where competitor Anthropic's deal with the Pentagon fell through. OpenAI's CEO, Sam Altm...

item.title: Investors' Shifting Preferences in AI SaaS Startups: What’s Losing Appeal
item.description: AI SaaS companies have seen a surge in investment over recent years, but the focus of investors is shifting. As AI technology becomes ubiquitous, certain AI-driven SaaS startups are losing investor in...

item.title: Ofcom Fines Pornography Provider £1.35m for Breaching UK Age Verification Rules Under Online Safety Act
item.description: A pornography provider, 8579 LLC, has been fined a record £1.35 million by Ofcom for failing to implement legally required age verification measures under the UK’s Online Safety Act. The penalty marks...

item.title: LGBTQ+ Athletes Compete in 2026 Winter Olympics Amid Increased Visibility and Backlash
item.description: At the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina, nearly 50 LGBTQ+ athletes are competing, making a significant impact compared to past Games. US figure skater Amber Glenn, who has been outspoken in suppo...

item.title: Law Roach reveals Zendaya and Tom Holland have secretly tied the knot
item.description: In a surprising revelation, Zendaya's longtime stylist, Law Roach, has claimed that the actress and Tom Holland have secretly married. Roach made the bombshell statement during an interview at the 202...

item.title: Ilia Malinin's Impact on Figure Skating and the Quadruple Axel
item.description: Ilia Malinin, often called the 'Quad God' for his exceptional skill in executing multiple quadruple jumps in a single figure skating program, has gained fame for his unique talent. Born into a family ...

item.title: England Introduces Reforms for Special Educational Needs and Support Plans
item.description: The UK government has announced a major reform of the special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) system in England, introducing new support structures and documents to improve care for children...

item.title: Over 50,000 Patients Waited Over 24 Hours for Hospital Beds in North West England
item.description: A BBC investigation has revealed that more than 52,000 patients across north-west England had to wait more than 24 hours for a bed in 2025, with many stuck in A&E corridors. This disturbing phenomenon...

item.title: Legal and International Steps Required to Remove Prince Andrew from the Line of Succession
item.description: The UK government is considering whether Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, currently eighth in line to the British throne, could be removed from the royal line of succession following his recent arrest on s...

item.title: BBC Sport Highlights the Top Moments from the 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: BBC Sport has released a video compilation allowing viewers to relive the standout moments from the 2026 Winter Olympics. The coverage brings together some of the most memorable performances, dramatic...

item.title: F1 2026: New Overtake Mode and Active Aero Explained
item.description: The 2026 Formula 1 season will see significant regulatory changes that could shake up the sport. A major overhaul of the engines and chassis, aimed at increasing sustainability and performance, is set...

item.title: Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni Suspended for One Match as UEFA Investigates Alleged Racism Towards Vinicius Junior
item.description: Gianluca Prestianni, a 20-year-old Benfica footballer, has been provisionally suspended by UEFA for one match ahead of the Champions League second-leg tie against Real Madrid. This decision follows al...
